subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-14 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The philosophers, too, each maintain that a power or Universal Reality is the source of all beings. Their only difference with the prophets
subcodes.first_line_orig: فلاسفه هم هر یک قوه و با حقیقت کلیه ا‌ی را مصدر کائنات گویند با انبیا اختلافشان
subcodes.subjects: @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
